subject: ☃ Frontiers Monthly Newsletter
body:
Frontiers
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb9207474d8392a5497c9e5f78a1144a24390e90bb3adbc56a47684ab3cc5eb385cf104 


TOP NEWS


http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074b82dfa89c45d189bff13ffa790722ffbc88f1c41b598da477186a4ee75a17b4c 

Happy holidays from our CEO
Yet another year has flown by and as 2016 draws to a close, I would like to take a moment to reflect on our accomplishments and extend a sincere thank you to the Frontiers community.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074ab28a7441e0ee1a9bc90c4cde554d6059847a7828a5ab936de9bcfcb2b251ed7 
Read more 


http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074c6d37d8950485f9a8eaeae485fe2d2f4e418af9835d254751369c2af9fcc9062 

Selection Committee Announced for First Annual Frontiers Spotlight Award
The jury has been chosen for the first Frontiers Spotlight Award, providing US$ 100,000 to a group of researchers to organise a conference on the subject of their Frontiers Research Topic. 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074dab208e079a4f41e1938f3c905801498dd1e039ea1e88a18c6c0faecf65f2a79 
Read more 



http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb920746cfcb1646e8592c4e595c735ef0a8f591e6020a77a8c38495bf9196859e206e9 

Germany setting a precedent for Open Access
Another Frontiers publishing agreement with a German institution reflects the growing trend towards open access in the country.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb920747724c23a02df93c9e6b46caff89562cc0a108335a4653e30da1e3998a4795d59 
Read more 




NEW EDITORS AND RECENT LAUNCHES


http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb920740c021cec78bcd093681ee306eb4ba227ceccb2448598d7fddda556ffb52929ae 

New journal launch - Frontiers in Education
One of the first social-sciences journals, 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074e3f855984e0c5a24c97adf98fcbc28e3e7f6c4183c1ec02641c1b706f7a20063 
Frontiers in Education  has been launched with its first five specialty sections.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb9207494526db529d5347ce7f32f6c537ba56be8729f27e7b7a93a3c89ca1d5adb4064 
Read more 



http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb920742aebac8f52f228623d086f2157ff8552b5bfd346fc49090a4ac784a0e6abe527 

New Chief Editors for Frontiers in Marine Evo Bio, Biogeography & Species Diversity

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074eb728bf9a251a367e06d95eedc51247b4094451234f035414af6994a3d23fd59 
Frontiers in Marine Science  announces expansion and re-naming of ‘Marine Systematics and Taxonomy’ specialty section,with 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb9207474614b13fe49949abf3389317114388dea5137cc642852c928c8d5ca3c394344 
Prof. Dr. Thomas Wilke  and 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074bdaa4f2b500fb7fa399bba7919f378b0cb8c51e5fc3e7d881f9f50cca9ceb20f 
Dr. Katrin Linse  as Specialty Chief Editors.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb920747d39c023f38b70423190c681b864b3220974ee7af5a58c9339942d14ba5a9931 
Read more 



RESEARCH IN THE NEWS


http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb9207461712b776219323a3c39a5c4be2a5c20cdd9e92432f8070163861354c98801df 

Washington Post: 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb9207461712b776219323a3c39a5c4be2a5c20cdd9e92432f8070163861354c98801df 
Could an insecure childhood have a big impact on your career? 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074914a4463e1893c70368c59f052229227b3c24ef9feb7573eb2089462d106ee00 

Fox News: 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074914a4463e1893c70368c59f052229227b3c24ef9feb7573eb2089462d106ee00 
This is why your balance gets worse after 40 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb9207413cbf88f74eb7ce223e1e4009428a1540c43913169998373ec91b62d1acad3a7 

The Wall Street Journal: 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb9207413cbf88f74eb7ce223e1e4009428a1540c43913169998373ec91b62d1acad3a7 
The worst kind of insomnia 



INTERVIEWS WITH FRONTIERS SCIENTISTS


http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb9207431a350277021af17720aec4a3e71e8a0347ccda989f5581c1a61239a66c7e2c9 

Researching one of the most disruptive volcanoes to forecast future eruptions

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074a46af49674569ffa0f185655aee18f5b5f763218059f821bd84ec14138fff427 
Prof. Valerio Acocella , Field Chief Editor for 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074f37089202cadb8ef594595fe3de748c765ddced792ed6cf2074b14b05cf0f3db 
Frontiers in Earth Science , discusses his research on pre-eruptive behaviour of the world’s most disruptive volcanoes.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074169b8b28bd175946b87a53ba6f0204f98ee8e6376c0028c4d0c8badffdce22e0 
Read more 



FEATURED RESEARCH TOPICS


http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb9207459dfc75d76f467e3e390822708c622846786a5052ecb1dc05cdcaa8dff59af69 

Towards a psychological and neuroscientific account of the wandering mind
A fundamental feature of the mind is its tendency to wander. Read cutting-edge work by researchers with a diversity of perspectives.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb920743696ec5af3e28827a392867c70f3aae45ac5e7961d8505b7cc29c9c77540038d 
Read more 



http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb920741d60354d79cf16774e8131327b06b27da88a1dd1ff8bf0273a8f8e6027372ef6 

Microbial community interactions as a source of new therapeutics
A spotlight on research that uses state-of-the-art –omics technologies to investigate microbial interactions as a source of new natural products and potential drug leads.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074c41a98e78d1427b4679aac948bd9b2e75cfa7184fdc9b8faa483037a5d13c29e 
Read more 



http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb920745be319fa817610f79a8b862b785136b5720ec434067538abe2d8ffa8454dcfaf 

Bridging the Gap Between Policy and Science in Assessing the Health Status of Marine Ecosystems
What is the science required for implementing the European Marine Strategy Framework Directive, and its aim of achieving good environmental status in all European seas by 2020?

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb920743407d18ceca0b2b20f1cc5af5093c4a12a681c593357bb68f07cfee7a6b628e9 
Read more 



SUPPORTING THE COMMUNITY


http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb9207427ef5eac12828742b787467a42788bb478e45fba3e36b4e8db2d352f99ceba06 

Publishing agreement with Consejo Superior de Investigaciones Científicas (CSIC)
CSIC now holds a pre-payment agreement with Frontiers and will be covering 40% of Article Publishing Fees for corresponding authors affiliated with the University who wish to publish in any of the Frontiers journals.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb920742a7ee1b48dbcf4a519c20ba517ce8c74a8075ee0937868974d43bd8eee9c60ec 
Read more 



http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb920743093235853c2837ced6d26dfc0b471f6edabe5977789981d282dd88b1f11a091 

Publishing agreement with Universität Tübingen
Tubingen University now holds a pre-payment agreement with Frontiers and will be covering 70% of Article Publishing Fees for corresponding authors affiliated with the University who wish to publish in any of the Frontiers journals.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=94637031eb7330c040c31442168d69e2da5c438adfda499d2c59a672180dc3c4775acc33b1a1cd26 
Read more 



http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=94637031eb7330c005c155cce707c28038eba118d1f229fd016adc766fdabda7442a563f733707ee 

Recently added eBooks
Twenty-eight new eBooks are now freely available to download in Science, Health and Engineering.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=94637031eb7330c0964df4daeb1043b4a1dbf53e2f697d7129e6fb4d6edb9a774b4a5c34e052ace6 
See list 



http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb920742a6ed9fd155a492d68b86dec43ad9b37478a28941e616735ef8002dabbfe9e39 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074e3f3ab1d5a717d1d15681c7fb65774466171e25ca47524d1e54719e83caacd36 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb92074c881848d7a39fa47dde48f98ef530961c2c74bfd36a47df50bff41cfc7297c54 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=386bb7729cb9207481b10d182bf8a6b203ceb999ea36491a21c7b181dfab321d3557b7ae2cb8f40b

body_html:
The latest news from Frontiers
TOP NEWS
Happy holidays from our CEO
Yet another year has flown by and as 2016 draws to a close, I would like to take a moment to reflect on our accomplishments and extend a sincere thank you to the Frontiers community.
Read more
Selection Committee Announced for First Annual Frontiers Spotlight Award
The jury has been chosen for the first Frontiers Spotlight Award, providing US$ 100,000 to a group of researchers to organise a conference on the subject of their Frontiers Research Topic. 
Read more
Germany setting a precedent for Open Access
Another Frontiers publishing agreement with a German institution reflects the growing trend towards open access in the country.
Read more
NEW EDITORS AND RECENT LAUNCHES
New journal launch - Frontiers in Education
One of the first social-sciences journals, Frontiers in Education has been launched with its first five specialty sections.
Read more
New Chief Editors for Frontiers in Marine Evo Bio, Biogeography & Species Diversity
Frontiers in Marine Science announces expansion and re-naming of ‘Marine Systematics and Taxonomy’ specialty section,with  Prof. Dr. Thomas Wilke and Dr. Katrin Linse as Specialty Chief Editors.
Read more
RESEARCH IN THE NEWS
Washington Post: Could an insecure childhood have a big impact on your career?
Fox News: This is why your balance gets worse after 40
The Wall Street Journal: The worst kind of insomnia
INTERVIEWS WITH FRONTIERS SCIENTISTS
Researching one of the most disruptive volcanoes to forecast future eruptions
Prof. Valerio Acocella, Field Chief Editor for Frontiers in Earth Science , discusses his research on pre-eruptive behaviour of the world’s most disruptive volcanoes.
Read more
FEATURED RESEARCH TOPICS
Towards a psychological and neuroscientific account of the wandering mind
A fundamental feature of the mind is its tendency to wander. Read cutting-edge work by researchers with a diversity of perspectives.
Read more
Microbial community interactions as a source of new therapeutics
A spotlight on research that uses state-of-the-art –omics technologies to investigate microbial interactions as a source of new natural products and potential drug leads.
Read more
Bridging the Gap Between Policy and Science in Assessing the Health Status of Marine Ecosystems
What is the science required for implementing the European Marine Strategy Framework Directive, and its aim of achieving good environmental status in all European seas by 2020?
Read more
SUPPORTING THE COMMUNITY
Publishing agreement with Consejo Superior de Investigaciones Científicas (CSIC)
CSIC now holds a pre-payment agreement with Frontiers and will be covering 40% of Article Publishing Fees for corresponding authors affiliated with the University who wish to publish in any of the Frontiers journals.
Read more
Publishing agreement with Universität Tübingen
Tubingen University now holds a pre-payment agreement with Frontiers and will be covering 70% of Article Publishing Fees for corresponding authors affiliated with the University who wish to publish in any of the Frontiers journals.
Read more
Recently added eBooks
Twenty-eight new eBooks are now freely available to download in Science, Health and Engineering.
